steps.t: Jáldor can be found somewhere inside Utterby. You should challenge and defeat Jáldor.
Kunchat has heard of your victory and wishes to speak with you. You should talk to Kunchat.
Kunchat is ready to give you the name of another Jangovar to challenge. You should talk to Kunchat.
Sháwat can be found somewhere inside Utterby. You should challenge and defeat Sháwat.
Kunchat has heard of your victory and wishes to speak with you. You should talk to Kunchat.
Kunchat is ready to give you the name of another Jangovar to challenge. You should talk to Kunchat.
Bakhíl can be found somewhere inside Utterby. You should challenge and defeat Bakhíl.
Kunchat is pleased with your prowess in duels. You should talk to Kunchat.
